name: paint-arena-ops-demo
description: QR-powered server-authoritative multiplayer paint game and Kubernetes operations demo

scripts.build: npm run build -w @paint-arena/shared && npm run build -w @paint-arena/game-api && npm run build -w @paint-arena/bot && npm run build -w @paint-arena/web
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @paint-arena/shared && concurrently -n api,web -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w @paint-arena/game-api" "npm run dev -w @paint-arena/web"
scripts.test: npm run build -w @paint-arena/shared && npm run test -w @paint-arena/game-api && npm run test -w @paint-arena/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @paint-arena/shared && npm run typecheck -w @paint-arena/game-api && npm run typecheck -w @paint-arena/bot && npm run typecheck -w @paint-arena/web
